title: 10 Effective Herbal Creams to Cure Jock Itch for Swimmers
description: Cymbopogon citratus creams have been found to help alleviate the symptoms of jock itch due to their antifungal properties. Cymbopogon citratus contains compounds such as limonene, beta-pinene, and citral, which have been shown to inhibit the growth of fungi like Trichophyton, the primary cause of jock itch.
